name.zh: 魔法小鹿 Codex 宠物

description.zh: 一只戴着魔法帽、拿着星星法杖的小鹿 Codex 宠物。这张图是角色源图；完整可安装动画包位于相邻的 ../magic-deer/ 目录。
description.en: A tiny deer Codex pet wearing a wizard hat and holding a star wand. This image is the character source; the complete installable animated package is in the adjacent ../magic-deer/ directory.

notes.zh: 宠物声音应贴合小鹿、魔法、可爱、轻轻笑、关心主人这些状态，不使用普通按钮哔声。
notes.en: Pet sounds should match deer-like, magical, cute, soft-laughing, caring states rather than generic UI beeps.
